ItacPersonItem.Notes: See his biography by Salvatore Di Salvo in DBI. In his house Goretti hosted gatherings of intellectuals discussing musical theories, such as `imperfettioni della moderna musica` (imperfections of modern music). Among his guests was Claudio Monteverdi. Goretti`s brother, Alfonso, composed the treatise `Dell`eccellenze, e prerogative della musica`, which was recited in the Accademia degli Intrepidi on 23 November 1603 (and printed in Ferrara in 1612).
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
